creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
I am getting the following messages in /var/log/auth.log:

 Nov 18 01:40:04 dv8t01 dbus-daemon: Would reject message, 1 matched rules; type="method_call", sender=":1.19" (uid=1001 pid=2858 comm=") interface="org.freedesktop.DBus.Introspectable" member="Introspect" error name="(unset)" requested_reply=0 destination="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit" (uid=0 pid=1117 comm="))
Nov 18 01:40:04 dv8t01 dbus-daemon: Would reject message, 1 matched rules; type="method_call", sender=":1.19" (uid=1001 pid=2858 comm=") interface="org.freedesktop.DBus.Introspectable" member="Introspect" error name="(unset)" requested_reply=0 destination="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit" (uid=0 pid=1117 comm="))
Nov 18 01:40:04 dv8t01 dbus-daemon: Would reject message, 1 matched rules; type="method_call", sender=":1.19" (uid=1001 pid=2858 comm=") interface="org.freedesktop.DBus.Introspectable" member="Introspect" error name="(unset)" requested_reply=0 destination="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit" (uid=0 pid=1117 comm="))
Nov 18 01:40:04 dv8t01 dbus-daemon: Would reject message, 1 matched rules; type="method_call", sender=":1.19" (uid=1001 pid=2858 comm=") interface="org.freedesktop.DBus.Introspectable" member="Introspect" error name="(unset)" requested_reply=0 destination="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit" (uid=0 pid=1117 comm="))

I googled for the error, and found that the ConsoleKit.conf file that is installed with version 0.3.0 is the cause of the problem.  The consolekit developers have corrected this problem with the latest version.

After patching the port to use the latest version, I no longer see this problem when upgrading the port to version 0.4.1

Fix: The attached patch upgrades the port to version 0.4.1

Note: patch-data_ConsoleKit.conf is no longer required, as these changes are now in the consolekit 0.4.1.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: install ConsoleKit 3.0, and then start kdm
